title: SOP Extractor Set Manifest
description: Manifest defining a set of source texts for the SOP Extractor.

set_id.description: Unique identifier for this set of sources.

members.description: The ordered list of sources that make up this set.

source_id.description: Unique identifier for the source. Used in provenance tags.

date.description: Publication or delivery date of the source in YYYY-MM-DD format.

role.description: The pedagogical role of the source.

skill_path.description: Path to the extracted skill directory relative to this manifest.

sequence.description: Tie-breaker for chronological ordering when multiple sources share the exact same date.
